calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Petition For Order To Reopen Estate For Administration After Discharge, And For Letters Testamentary Issued With Authorization To Administer Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act With Full Authority
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that the supplemental declaration was very thorough and very convincing, and noted that no one is here to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated November 11, 1999 and the original codicil dated May 25, 2017 are admitted to probate. Maureen McFadden is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by April 4, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
